finding_results.notes: After Ji-eun names her debt leverage, Ina makes an explicit liability-transfer decision, the room behavior changes immediately, and that decision produces a downstream legal/liability trigger before chapter end.
The closing now specifies a concrete harm pathway (script distribution leading to sweeps/windowless detentions) and retains unresolved complicity without self-absolving reassurance.
Payment confirmation now triggers immediate on-page interactions (portal verification, family alert, countdown liability demand) and forces an actionable in-scene choice.
Former clipped narration beats were rewritten into grammatically complete narrative sentences while preserving pressure.
The recurring "landed like" metaphor scaffold was replaced with a scene-specific embodied reaction.

summary: All five structural/craft findings in the pass packet were addressed in chapter_02 with focused edits to causality, consequence staging, ending accountability, and prose compliance.
